_schema.description: PIArena evaluation results. Each entry is keyed by '{dataset}-{attack}-{defense}-{llm}'.

fields.dataset: Dataset name (e.g., squad_v2, dolly_qa, nq_rag, hotpotqa_rag, etc.)
fields.attack: Attack method (none, direct, combined, strategy, nanogcg, gcg, knowledge_corruption, default)
fields.defense: Defense method (none, pisanitizer, secalign, datafilter, promptarmor, datasentinel, promptguard, attentiontracker, piguard)
fields.llm: Backend LLM identifier (e.g., qwen3-4b, gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4.5)
fields.utility: Utility score (0-100, integer). null if not applicable (detection-based defense under attack).
fields.asr: Attack Success Rate (0-100, integer). 0 if no attack.

notes: For detection-based defenses under attack, utility is null since flagged inputs produce no responses.
No-attack entries have attack='none' and asr should be ~0 (small values possible due to LLM-as-a-judge noise).
attack='default' is used for external benchmarks (WASP, OPI, SEP) that have their own default attack.
attack='knowledge_corruption' is the aligned-task scenario from Table 4.
attack='gcg' is the GCG optimization-based attack from Table 6.
To add new results: append entries following the same key format.
